canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>rime</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
let grid;
let cellSize = 3;
let cols, rows;
let walkers = [];
let crystalPixels = [];
let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };
let audioCtx = null;
let time = 0;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cols = Math.floor(W / cellSize);
  rows = Math.floor(H / cellSize);
  initGrid();
}

function initGrid() {
  grid = new Array(cols * rows).fill(0);
  crystalPixels = [];
  walkers = [];
  
  // Seed initial crystals at edges (like frost forming from window frame)
  for (let i = 0; i < cols; i++) {
    if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
      const idx = i;
      grid[idx] = 1;
      crystalPixels.push({ x: i, y: 0, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
    }
    if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
      const idx = i + (rows - 1) * cols;
      grid[idx] = 1;
      crystalPixels.push({ x: i, y: rows - 1, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
    }
  }
  for (let j = 0; j < rows; j++) {
    if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
      const idx = j * cols;
      grid[idx] = 1;
      crystalPixels.push({ x: 0, y: j, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
    }
    if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
      const idx = (cols - 1) + j * cols;
      grid[idx] = 1;
      crystalPixels.push({ x: cols - 1, y: j, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
    }
  }
  
  // Spawn initial walkers
  for (let i = 0; i < 2000; i++) {
    spawnWalker();
  }
}

function spawnWalker() {
  // Spawn from random edge
  const edge = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
  let x, y;
  switch (edge) {
    case 0: x = Math.random() * cols; y = 0; break;
    case 1: x = Math.random() * cols; y = rows - 1; break;
    case 2: x = 0; y = Math.random() * rows; break;
    case 3: x = cols - 1; y = Math.random() * rows; break;
  }
  walkers.push({ x, y, steps: 0 });
}

function initAudio() {
  if (audioCtx) return;
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
}

function playChime(freq, vol = 0.03) {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  
  osc.type = 'sine';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
  
  filter.type = 'highpass';
  filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(2000, audioCtx.currentTime);
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo = gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime.bind(gain.gain);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
  
  osc.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
}

function seedCrystal(cx, cy) {
  const gx = Math.floor(cx / cellSize);
  const gy = Math.floor(cy / cellSize);
  
  if (gx >= 0 && gx < cols && gy >= 0 && gy < rows) {
    const idx = gx + gy * cols;
    if (grid[idx] === 0) {
      grid[idx] = 1;
      crystalPixels.push({ x: gx, y: gy, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
      playChime(800 + Math.random() * 400, 0.08);
    }
  }
}

function updateWalkers() {
  const mouseGx = mouse.x / cellSize;
  const mouseGy = mouse.y / cellSize;
  const heatRadius = 40;
  
  let attachCount = 0;
  
  for (let i = walkers.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const w = walkers[i];
    
    // Random walk with slight bias away from mouse (heat repels)
    let dx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    let dy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    
    // Heat repulsion
    const distToMouse = Math.hypot(w.x - mouseGx, w.y - mouseGy);
    if (distToMouse < heatRadius) {
      const repel = (heatRadius - distToMouse) / heatRadius;
      dx += (w.x - mouseGx) / distToMouse * repel * 0.5;
      dy += (w.y - mouseGy) / distToMouse * repel * 0.5;
    }
    
    w.x += dx;
    w.y += dy;
    w.steps++;
    
    // Wrap or respawn if out of bounds
    if (w.x < 0 || w.x >= cols || w.y < 0 || w.y >= rows || w.steps > 5000) {
      walkers.splice(i, 1);
      spawnWalker();
      continue;
    }
    
    // Check for adjacent crystal (8-connected)
    const gx = Math.floor(w.x);
    const gy = Math.floor(w.y);
    let adjacent = false;
    
    for (let ox = -1; ox <= 1 && !adjacent; ox++) {
      for (let oy = -1; oy <= 1 && !adjacent; oy++) {
        if (ox === 0 && oy === 0) continue;
        const nx = gx + ox;
        const ny = gy + oy;
        if (nx >= 0 && nx < cols && ny >= 0 && ny < rows) {
          if (grid[nx + ny * cols] === 1) {
            adjacent = true;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Attach to crystal with some stickiness probability
    if (adjacent && Math.random() < 0.15) {
      const idx = gx + gy * cols;
      if (grid[idx] === 0) {
        grid[idx] = 1;
        crystalPixels.push({ x: gx, y: gy, age: 0, seed: Math.random() });
        attachCount++;
      }
      walkers.splice(i, 1);
      spawnWalker();
    }
  }
  
  // Audio feedback for crystal growth
  if (attachCount > 0 && Math.random() < 0.1) {
    const freq = 1200 + Math.random() * 1600;
    playChime(freq, 0.02 * Math.min(attachCount, 5));
  }
}

function render() {
  // Slight fade for trails
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.1)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  time++;
  
  // Age crystals
  for (const p of crystalPixels) {
    p.age++;
  }
  
  // Draw crystals
  for (const p of crystalPixels) {
    const age = Math.min(p.age / 500, 1);
    const x = p.x * cellSize;
    const y = p.y * cellSize;
    
    // Color gradient: cyan (new) -> pink (old) with seed variation
    const hue = 180 + age * 150 + p.seed * 30; // 180 (cyan) to 330 (pink)
    const sat = 80 + p.seed * 20;
    const light = 50 + (1 - age) * 30;
    const alpha = 0.7 + Math.sin(time * 0.02 + p.seed * 10) * 0.1;
    
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${hue % 360}, ${sat}%, ${light}%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.fillRect(x, y, cellSize, cellSize);
    
    // Subtle glow for newer crystals
    if (p.age < 100) {
      const glow = (100 - p.age) / 100;
      ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${hue % 360}, 100%, 70%, ${glow * 0.3})`;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x + cellSize / 2, y + cellSize / 2, cellSize * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
  
  // Draw a few walkers (not all, too noisy)
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)';
  for (let i = 0; i < walkers.length; i += 10) {
    const w = walkers[i];
    ctx.fillRect(w.x * cellSize, w.y * cellSize, 1, 1);
  }
  
  // Mouse heat glow
  if (mouse.x > 0 && mouse.y > 0) {
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(mouse.x, mouse.y, 0, mouse.x, mouse.y, 120);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 150, 100, 0.1)');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 150, 100, 0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fillRect(mouse.x - 120, mouse.y - 120, 240, 240);
  }
  
  // Frost border vignette
  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, Math.min(W, H) * 0.3, W/2, H/2, Math.max(W, H) * 0.7);
  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0)');
  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.4)');
  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
}

function animate() {
  // Multiple walker updates per frame for faster growth
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    updateWalkers();
  }
  
  // Maintain walker population
  while (walkers.length < 3000) {
    spawnWalker();
  }
  
  render();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouse.x = -1000;
  mouse.y = -1000;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  seedCrystal(e.clientX, e.clientY);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  seedCrystal(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
});

// Init
resize();
animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
